text:
Alternative carer assessments

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court, serve on the parties, and send to the person assessed viability assessments of the alternative carers proposed by the parents.

In the event that any viability assessment is positive, the local authority shall file at court, serve on the parties, and send to the person being assessed a special guardianship or connected person foster care assessment of that person by 4.00pm on [date].

Permission is given for the local authority to disclose such documents as they consider necessary from the bundle to the person being assessed.

If the assessment is negative the local authority shall write to the person assessed informing them how they may apply to the court to challenge that assessment and the date and time of the next hearing in this matter.

The local authority is requested to fund a session of legal advice for one potential carer (or joint carers) for consideration of the legal basis upon which they seek to care for the child[ren].

The local authority must not undertake any further viability assessments without application to the court.

The local authority must arrange for any proposed special guardian to attend the hearing on [date] provided for above. The proposed special guardian must be sent a copy of the care plans for the children when it is filed at court and served on the parties.

Parenting assessment

The local authority shall file at court and serve on the parties:

By 4.00pm on [date] a parenting assessment plan; and

By 4.00pm on [date] a [PAMS] parenting assessment of [name(s)] [as joint and sole carers].

Final evidence

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties their final evidence and care plans.

The parents shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties their final statements in reply.

The guardian shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties a final analysis.

Issues resolution hearing / early final hearing

The following directions apply in preparation for the issues resolution hearing / early final hearing provided for above:

The respondents shall not later than 3 working days prior to the hearing file at court and serve on the parties a position statement.
